title: Failed to decode the keys ["infra_image"]
body:
/kind bug


**Description**

change default infra_image by using user config
```
infra_image = "kubernetes/pause:latest
```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1.
```echo "infra_image = "kubernetes/pause:latest" > ~/.config/containers/containers.conf```
2.
```podman --version```

**Describe the results you received:**
```
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["infra_image"] from "/home/vbn/.config/containers/containers.conf".
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["infra_image"] from "/home/vbn/.config/containers/containers.conf".
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["infra_image"] from "/home/vbn/.config/containers/containers.conf".
podman version 3.4.1
```


**Describe the results you expected:**
```
podman version 3.4.1
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Always happens
**Output of `podman version`:**

```
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["infra_image"] from "/home/vbn/.config/containers/containers.conf".
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["infra_image"] from "/home/vbn/.config/containers/containers.conf".
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["infra_image"] from "/home/vbn/.config/containers/containers.conf".

Version:      3.4.1
API Version:  3.4.1
Go Version:   go1.16.8
Built:        Wed Oct 20 22:31:56 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body:
@xfoobar Value is missing closing `"` ( double-quote ) also key `infra_image` is under table `[engine]`.

So final config should look like
```toml
[containers]

[engine]
  infra_image = "kubernetes/pause:latest"

[machine]

[network]

[secrets]
```
I am closing this issue since it looks like a typo from your end.
